holdings.infoBox: SPYM is an equity ETF with a total of 509 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.81%, Apple at 6.82%, Microsoft at 4.42%, Amazon.com at 3.64%, and Alphabet at 3.35%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR Portfolio S&P 500 ETF (SPYM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of 500 large- and mid-cap US companies selected by the S&P Committee. SPYM was launched on Nov 8, 2005 and is issued by State Street.

data.text: The S&P 500 secured a 0.9% weekly gain during the holiday-shortened trading week, marking its second straight advance and its 11th positive week in the past 12.
